events.title: Lazarus Group targets European defense companies for drone data
events.summary: North Korean Lazarus APT group targeted three European defense sector companies to steal sensitive information on drone components and manufacturing processes using a social engineering campaign with fake job offers.

events.title: Lazarus Group steals $30.4 million from South Korean Upbit exchange
events.summary: South Korean authorities reported that North Korea's Lazarus Group stole $30.4 million in cryptocurrency from South Korea’s Upbit exchange. The attack is linked to Pyongyang’s broader campaign to fund its regime via cyber theft.

events.title: Lazarus组织利用AnySign4PC漏洞发动金融行业水坑攻击
events.summary: Lazarus组织利用AnySign4PC漏洞在金融行业目标网站上发动水坑攻击，导致远程代码执行，并发现多个水坑分发站点被持续使用。

events.title: Lazarus Group 针对求职者的恶意软件分发活动
events.summary: Lazarus Group（朝鲜）通过伪装成雇主进行虚假面试，诱导软件开发者下载恶意NPM包，从而部署BeaverTail和InvisibleFerret恶意软件，窃取加密货币钱包信息并实现远程控制。
